QueryDedicatedLines.marker: The starting position for paginated list queries, a system-generated string
QueryDedicatedLines.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page, typically not exceeding 1000, default value is 1000
QueryDedicatedLines.status: Dedicated line status. Valid values: ack-wait/accept/reject/building/pay-wait/established/stopped/deleted, corresponding to: Pending/Accepted/Rejected/Under Construction/Unpaid (construction complete, port duration fee unpaid)/Available/Expired/Deleting after expiration
